testcase.name: test_copyright

skipped.message: No copyright header has been placed in the generated source file.

testcase.skipped: /home/avaradar/ros2_ws/src/defect_detection/test/test_copyright.py:20: No copyright header has been placed in the generated source file.

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 82 code style errors / warnings: ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:1:1: F401 'defect_detection.defect_detection.defect_localization.extract_3d_detections.CustomDetection3D' imported but unused ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:1:100: E501 line too long (105 > 99 characters) ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:6:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'import message_filters' should be before 'from rclpy.qos import qos_profile_sensor_data' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:10:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from sensor_msgs.msg import PointCloud2' should be before 'import yaml' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:11:1: I101 Imported names are in the wrong order. Should be BoundingBox3D, Detection2DArray, Detection3D, Detection3DArray, ObjectHypothesisWithPose ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:19:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from defect_localization import extract_detections_3d' should be before 'from vision_msgs.msg import Detection2DArray, Detection3DArray, Detection3D, BoundingBox3D, ObjectHypothesisWithPose' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:25:26: Q000 Double quotes found but single quotes preferred ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:27:19: Q000 Double quotes found but single quotes preferred ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:27:35: Q000 Double quotes found but single quotes preferred ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:30:22: Q000 Double quotes found but single quotes preferred ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:39:44: E261 at least two spaces before inline comment comment ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:45:62: E262 inline comment should start with '# ' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:45:100: E501 line too long (133 > 99 ./defect_detection/defect_detection/fusion_node.py:199:11: W292 no newline at end of file ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:5:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'import numpy' should be before 'import yaml' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:8:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from cv_bridge import CvBridge' should be before 'from ultralytics import YOLO' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:10:1: I101 Imported names are in the wrong order. Should be Detection2D, Detection2DArray, ObjectHypothesisWithPose ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:11:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from vision_msgs.msg import BoundingBox2D' should be before 'from vision_msgs.msg import Detection2DArray, Detection2D, ObjectHypothesisWithPose' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:12:1: I100 Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from rclpy.qos import qos_profile_sensor_data' should be before 'from vision_msgs.msg import BoundingBox2D' ./defect_detection/defect_detection/yolo_detector.py:17:26: Q000 Double quotes found but
